summary: The diff implements most of the 8 requirements substantially. REQ-1 through REQ-8 are all present, but there are notable gaps: the GA drawings export produces an HTML file rather than a PDF (violating the PDF requirement), the token generation algorithm is deterministic/sequential rather than random, and the Ridge Connection detail modal is missing (only Base Plate and Haunch are implemented). Overall coverage is high but with specific acceptance criteria gaps.

missing_requirements.requirement: GA Drawings must be packaged into a downloadable PDF file titled 'General Arrangement (GA) Drawings'
missing_requirements.reason: The svgToPdf.ts utility generates and downloads an HTML file (.html extension, text/html blob) rather than a PDF. The acceptance criterion explicitly requires a PDF download. No jsPDF or equivalent PDF library is used.

missing_requirements.requirement: Clicking a hotspot must open a modal with the corresponding connection detail for Ridge Connection type
missing_requirements.reason: ConnectionDetailModal.tsx only defines BasePlateDetail and HaunchDetail SVG components. There is no RidgeDetail component or handling for the 'ridge' ConnectionType, meaning clicking the Ridge hotspot would show no meaningful detail view.

missing_requirements.requirement: The shared link token must be a unique random alphanumeric token (e.g., 8-char alphanumeric)
missing_requirements.reason: The generateToken() function in backend/main.mo uses a deterministic sequential loop (char = charsArray[i % chars.size()]) which produces the same fixed string every time rather than a random token, so tokens are not unique across calls.

hallucinated_features.description: The GA drawings export downloads an HTML file instead of a PDF
hallucinated_features.reason: svgToPdf.ts creates a Blob of type text/html and downloads it with a .html extension. The build request mandates a PDF output using a client-side SVG-to-PDF approach such as jsPDF.

hallucinated_features.description: STAAD.Pro export includes additional sections beyond what was requested: DEFINE MATERIAL, MEMBER PROPERTY AMERICAN, CONSTANTS, SUPPORTS, LOAD, and PERFORM ANALYSIS sections
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only specifies JOINT COORDINATES and MEMBER INCIDENCES sections as required content. The extra sections exceed the spec.
